title: Defrost learning
subtitle: Operational defrost characteristics are learned from observed cycles. Safety temperature limits are never learned or changed.
observingHint: Collecting complete cycles. Until a profile is approved, excursions during defrost stay normal incidents (flagged potentially defrost-related) and are never auto-suppressed.
suggestionHint: Enough complete cycles observed. Review the suggested values and approve them to let the engine treat in-envelope defrost excursions as expected.
approvedHint: Approved values are used to reclassify expected defrost excursions. They never change storage-temperature safety limits.
driftHint: Recent cycles differ from the approved profile ({{detail}}). Consider resetting and retraining. Nothing was changed automatically.
resetConfirm: Discard the learned profile and any suggestion and re-enter observation?
safetyNote: Learned values are operational only — never legal or HACCP-certified limits.
